sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmaps (id UInt32, bmap Bitmap) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bitmaps VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bmap, bitmapBuild([2, 5]))) FROM test_bitmaps WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_bitmaps SET bmap = bitmapXor(bmap, bitmapBuild([1, 4])) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bmap, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]))) AS result FROM test_bitmaps;
